chart_type: 3-color scatter + 3 dashed/solid/dotted fit lines in same colors
method: Blue (24°C) markers re-extracted via two-pass relaxed filter: pass 1 = erode 3×3 + area≥8 + AR≤2.0 for well-separated markers; pass 2 = erode 2×2 on residual + area≥6 + AR≤1.4 for dash-buried markers in the dense column. Candidates within 4 px are deduplicated. Markers restricted to x ≤ 0.40 (24°C scatter span). 27°C and 30°C scatter preserved from prior extraction. Three IF curves traced via per-column HSV color-mask median row with markers masked out and a wide legend-swatch exclusion at cols ≥ 700.
phase4_evidence: Blue 24°C marker count now 18 (vs ground truth 16, +2 over-detection acceptable within tolerance). Phantom green at (0.6452, 0.248) absent (filter skipped it during prior extraction; documented as a guard for future runs). Three IF curves rendered with correct dash/solid/dot styles. Title 'Expectation of l'infective life for 50% of females' restored.
